overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {(1) RCH_{2}CH_{2}COOH + CoA + ATP} \xrightarrow {\text {Thiokinase}} \text {RCH_{2}CH_{2}COCoA + AMP + Pyrophosphate} \\ \text {(Fatty acid)} \quad \text {(Fatty acyl - CoA)} \\ \text {(2) RCH_{2}CH_{2}COCoA + FAD} \xrightarrow {\text {Acyl dehydrogenase}} \text {RCH_{2}CH=CHCOCoA + FADH_{2}} \\ \text {(Fatty acyl - CoA)} \\ \text {(3) RCH_{2}CH=CHCOCoA + H_{2}O} \xrightarrow {\text {Enoyl hydrase}} \text {RCH_{2}CHOHCH_{2}COCoA} \\ \text {(4) RCH_{2}CHOHCH_{2}COCoA + NAD^{+}} \xrightarrow [ \text {dehydrogenase} ]{\beta \text {-Hydroxyacyl}} \text {RCH_{2}COCH_{2}COCoA + NADH + H^{+}} \\ \text {(5) RCH_{2}COCH_{2}COCoA + CoA} \xrightarrow {\text {Thiolase}} \text {RCH_{2}COCoA + CH_{3}COCoA} \\ \text {(Fatty acyl - CoA)} \quad \text {(Acetyl - CoA)} \\ \text {(Figure 69-3. Beta oxidation of fatty acids to yield acetyl coenzyme A.} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text{(1) } \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CH}_{2}\mathrm{COOH}+\mathrm{CoA}+\mathrm{ATP} \xrightarrow{\text{Thiokinase}} \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA}+\mathrm{AMP}+\text{Pyrophosphate} \\ \text{(Fatty acid)} \quad \text{(Fatty acyl - CoA)} \\ \text{(2) } \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA}+\mathrm{FAD} \xrightarrow{\text{Acyl dehydrogenase}} \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CH}=\mathrm{CHCOCoA}+\mathrm{FADH}_{2} \\ \text{(Fatty acyl - CoA)} \\ \text{(3) } \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CH}=\mathrm{CHCOCoA}+\mathrm{H}_{2}\mathrm{O} \xrightarrow{\text{Enoyl hydrase}} \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CHOHCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA} \\ \text{(4) } \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{CHOHCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA}+\mathrm{NAD}^{+} \xrightarrow[\text{dehydrogenase}]{\beta\text{-Hydroxyacyl}} \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA}+\mathrm{NADH}+\mathrm{H}^{+} \\ \text{(5) } \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA}+\mathrm{CoA} \xrightarrow{\text{Thiolase}} \mathrm{RCH}_{2}\mathrm{COCoA}+\mathrm{CH}_{3}\mathrm{COCoA} \\ \text{(Fatty acyl - CoA)} \quad \text{(Acetyl - CoA)} \\ \text{(Figure 69-3. Beta oxidation of fatty acids to yield acetyl coenzyme A.} \end{array}
